Experts advise controlling reactions, avoiding sudden movements, and maintaining a safe distance. Recognizing warning signs like hood-raising is crucial. For indoor or public space sightings, always call trained rescue teams. Awareness of surroundings and keeping pets secure are key preventative measures.

etimesWho is Kyle Long? The Ohio man charged with wife’s murder after claiming she stabbed herself 17 times – what to know about the caseA husband in London, Ohio, faces murder charges. His wife's death, initially thought to be self-inflicted, is now considered a homicide. Investigators found inconsistencies in his account. Autopsy revealed defensive wounds. The case took a dramatic turn after a four-month probe. He is held on a substantial bond as legal proceedings begin.

etimesUPSC rank 301 turns into a mystery as two candidates named Akanksha Singh claim itA unique controversy has emerged from the UPSC Civil Services Examination results. Two candidates named Akanksha Singh are claiming the same rank, 301. One claimant is from Bihar, the granddaughter of Brahmeshwar Singh. The other claimant is from Uttar Pradesh, alleging impersonation. An admit card circulating online has added to the confusion.
